title: Dissonant
tagline: A patience test disguised as a game.
description: It doesn't adapt to you. It doesn't compromise. Win, and the reward isn't loot or stats - it's resilience. Control Vil through a mesmerizing realm governed by the all-seeing Observer. Simple mechanics you can play with 1 or 2 buttons. The challenge isn't complexity - it's keeping your head when the game refuses to meet you halfway.
pullQuote: No builds. No stats. No safety net. Just you, the controls, and the consequences.
playerQuote: I hate this game but I also love it. So many deaths but you want to keep going. - Sudden Lee

title: Krodha
tagline: Anger forged into something worth fighting for.
description: 13 months in the making. From early prototype to a game built through iteration, refinement, and discarding ideas that didn't earn their place. Featuring an original soundtrack composed specifically for the game. Preparing for Early Access on Steam.
status: In Development - Early Access Coming Soon
pullQuote: Game development is rarely linear, but seeing the progress laid out makes the long nights feel worth it.
